forecasts.short: Light Rain Likely then Patchy Fog
forecasts.detailed: Rain likely before 8pm, then patchy fog between 1am and 2am. Partly cloudy, with a low around 30. West wind 0 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

forecasts.short: Chance Rain Showers then Mostly Clear
forecasts.detailed: A chance of rain showers and patchy fog before 7pm. Mostly clear, with a low around 32. West wind 6 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

A chance of rain showers before 8pm, then a chance of rain and snow showers. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 30. West wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

forecasts.short: Light Rain Likely then Partly Cloudy
forecasts.detailed: Rain likely before 10pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 34. West wind 5 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.
Mostly clear, with a low around 32. Southwest wind 2 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
A chance of rain showers. Partly cloudy, with a low around 34. West wind 2 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
